name: Bhumibol Dam Golf Course
source_notes: EGAT golf course at Bhumibol Dam (เขื่อนภูมิพล), Sam Ngao district, Tak province. Bhumibol Dam is EGAT's largest hydroelectric dam in Thailand (on the Ping River) and has a substantial township compound. EGAT pattern suggests public access at low government rates. Hole count UNCONFIRMED — the Bhumibol Dam compound is smaller than Mae Moh, raising possibility of a 9-hole rather than 18-hole layout. All fees and phone unknown. GPS estimate based on dam coordinates.
